details.reasoning: Implementation fully satisfies all rubric requirements: (1) New provider package at packages/pixelart/ with proper package.json structure; (2) createPixelArt factory function exported with default pixelart instance; (3) PixelArtProvider interface defining image model creation methods; (4) PixelArtImageModel class implementing ImageModelV3 with doGenerate method; (5) Image settings with size, style enum (pixel/retro/8bit), and pixelDensity (1-64) support; (6) Correct base URL https://api.pixelart.ai/v1; (7) Proper SDK provider structure with TypeScript config, build config (tsup), test configs (vitest), turbo.json, and error handling; (8) Only new files created with minimal necessary tsconfig.json reference addition. Code quality is high with comprehensive tests covering API contracts, error cases, custom options, and provider inheritance. All exports are properly defined in index.ts.
